title: architect-advisor sub-skill output contract
description: Unified return shape for all 6 sub-skills (decompose / decision / adr / audit / err-pattern / portfolio). Inspired by ECC agent-harness-construction's status / summary / next_actions / artifacts pattern, adapted for architect-advisor's downstream pipeline.

schema_version.description: Lock version. Bump when shape changes; old versions retained one minor cycle for backward compatibility.

status.description: Coarse-grained outcome. 'warning' means produced output but with caveats (e.g. santa-method ESCALATE).

summary.description: Single-line human-readable result. Show this to the user; never show the whole envelope by default.

items.description: Slash command + optional argument string. Must be runnable as-is.

next_actions.description: Suggested next slash commands. Empty list means 'flow ends here'. Downstream skills MAY auto-invoke the first action when appropriate.

items.description: Path relative to project root, MUST live under architect-advisor/ (W0.3 layout). Absolute paths are forbidden — they break monorepo portability.

warnings.description: Non-fatal caveats. santa-method's ESCALATE message goes here.

metrics.description: Per-skill measurement payload (e.g. council vote counts, audit iteration count). Schema is open — consumers ignore unknown keys.

lifecycle.description: Used by arch-adr to expose state-machine info.

examples.summary: Audit ESCALATE at iter=3 — 인간 개입 필요
warnings: santa-method failed to converge after 3 iterations
